calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Continued To Oct-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Linda Y. Chan, Esq. appeared appeared for plaintiff TCF Inventory Finance.
Fabian Saldivar, Collateral & Service Inspector for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Abe A. Arship, dba ABC Appliance.
Default was entered against defendant on March 12, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff TCF Inventory Finance, and against the Defaulted Defendant Abe A. Arship, dba ABC Appliance as follows:

Damages/Principal - $84,825.19.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,785.40.
Costs - $414.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $93,024.59.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Continued To Jul-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
